content.content:
1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"os"
     7→	"path/filepath"
     8→	"strings"
     9→	"sync"
    10→	"time"
    11→
    12→	"github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/orchestration"
    13→)
    14→
    15→// ProductionBranchRunner defines the interface for production branch job execution
    16→type ProductionBranchRunner interface {
    17→	RenderLLMExecAssets(optionID string) (string, error)
    18→	RenderORWApplyAssets(optionID string) (string, error)
    19→}
    20→
    21→// fanoutOrchestrator implements the FanoutOrchestrator interface
    22→type fanoutOrchestrator struct {
    23→	submitter interface{} // MockJobSubmitter in tests, real submitter in production
    24→	runner    ProductionBranchRunner // For accessing asset rendering methods in production
    25→}
    26→
    27→// NewFanoutOrchestrator creates a new fanout orchestrator
    28→func NewFanoutOrchestrator(submitter interface{}) FanoutOrchestrator {
    29→	return &fanoutOrchestrator{
    30→		submitter: submitter,
    31→		runner:    nil, // Will be nil for mock tests
    32→	}
    33→}
    34→
    35→// NewFanoutOrchestratorWithRunner creates a new fanout orchestrator with runner access for production
    36→func NewFanoutOrchestratorWithRunner(submitter interface{}, runner ProductionBranchRunner) FanoutOrchestrator {
    37→	return &fanoutOrchestrator{
    38→		submitter: submitter,
    39→		runner:    runner,
    40→	}
    41→}
    42→
    43→// RunHealingFanout executes parallel healing branches with first-success-wins semantics
    44→func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) RunHealingFanout(ctx context.Context, runCtx interface{}, branches []BranchSpec, maxParallel int) (BranchResult, []BranchResult, error) {
    45→	if len(branches) == 0 {
    46→		return BranchResult{}, nil, fmt.Errorf("no branches to execute")
    47→	}
    48→
    49→	// Create context for cancellation when first branch succeeds
    50→	fanoutCtx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)
    51→	defer cancel()
    52→
    53→	// Channel to receive results
    54→	resultCh := make(chan BranchResult, len(branches))
    55→	var wg sync.WaitGroup
    56→
    57→	// Semaphore to limit parallelism
    58→	sem := make(chan struct{}, maxParallel)
    59→
    60→	// Launch all branches
    61→	for _, branch := range branches {
    62→		wg.Add(1)
    63→		go func(b BranchSpec) {
    64→			defer wg.Done()
    65→
    66→			// Acquire semaphore slot
    67→			select {
    68→			case sem <- struct{}{}:
    69→			case <-fanoutCtx.Done():
    70→				// Context cancelled, branch doesn't execute
    71→				resultCh <- BranchResult{
    72→					ID:     b.ID,
    73→					Status: "cancelled",
    74→					Notes:  "cancelled before execution",
    75→				}
    76→				return
    77→			}
    78→			defer func() { <-sem }() // Release semaphore slot
    79→
    80→			// Execute the branch
    81→			result := o.executeBranch(fanoutCtx, b)
    82→			resultCh <- result
    83→
    84→			// If this branch succeeded and context isn't cancelled, cancel others
    85→			if result.Status == "completed" {
    86→				cancel()
    87→			}
    88→		}(branch)
    89→	}
    90→
    91→	// Collect results
    92→	var allResults []BranchResult
    93→	var winner BranchResult
    94→	foundWinner := false
    95→
    96→	// Wait for all branches to complete or be cancelled
    97→	go func() {
    98→		wg.Wait()
    99→		close(resultCh)
   100→	}()
   101→
   102→	for result := range resultCh {
   103→		allResults = append(allResults, result)
   104→
   105→		// First successful result becomes the winner
   106→		if result.Status == "completed" && !foundWinner {
   107→			winner = result
   108→			foundWinner = true
   109→		}
   110→	}
   111→
   112→	if !foundWinner {
   113→		return BranchResult{}, allResults, fmt.Errorf("all branches failed, no winner")
   114→	}
   115→
   116→	return winner, allResults, nil
   117→}
   118→
   119→// executeBranch executes a single branch and returns the result
   120→func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec) BranchResult {
   121→	startTime := time.Now()
   122→
   123→	result := BranchResult{
   124→		ID:        branch.ID,
   125→		Status:    "failed", // Default to failed
   126→		StartedAt: startTime,
   127→	}
   128→
   129→	// Check if context is already cancelled
   130→	select {
   131→	case <-ctx.Done():
   132→		result.Status = "cancelled"
   133→		result.Notes = "context cancelled"
   134→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   135→		result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   136→		return result
   137→	default:
   138→	}
   139→
   140→	// Check if this is a test submitter (backward compatibility)
   141→	if testSubmitter, ok := o.submitter.(interface {
   142→		SubmitAndWaitTerminal(ctx context.Context, spec JobSpec) (JobResult, error)
   143→	}); ok {
   144→		spec := JobSpec{
   145→			Name:    branch.ID,
   146→			Type:    branch.Type,
   147→			Inputs:  branch.Inputs,
   148→			Timeout: 30 * time.Minute, // Default timeout
   149→		}
   150→
   151→		jobResult, err := testSubmitter.SubmitAndWaitTerminal(ctx, spec)
   152→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   153→		result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   154→
   155→		if err != nil {
   156→			result.Status = "failed"
   157→			result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("job execution failed: %v", err)
   158→		} else {
   159→			result.JobID = jobResult.JobID
   160→			result.Status = jobResult.Status
   161→			result.Notes = jobResult.Output
   162→		}
   163→
   164→		return result
   165→	}
   166→
   167→	// Production implementation using real Nomad job submission
   168→	if o.runner != nil {
   169→		switch branch.Type {
   170→		case "llm-exec":
   171→			return o.executeLLMExecBranch(ctx, branch, result)
   172→		case "orw-gen":
   173→			return o.executeORWGenBranch(ctx, branch, result)
   174→		case "human-step":
   175→			return o.executeHumanStepBranch(ctx, branch, result)
   176→		default:
   177→			result.Status = "failed"
   178→			result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("unsupported branch type: %s", branch.Type)
   179→			result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   180→			result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   181→			return result
   182→		}
   183→	}
   184→
   185→	// No runner provided and not a test submitter
   186→	result.Status = "failed"
   187→	result.Notes = "no production runner or test submitter available for job submission"
   188→	result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   189→	result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   190→	return result
   191→}
   192→
   193→// executeLLMExecBranch executes an LLM-based code generation branch
   194→func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeLLMExecBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   195→	// Step 1: Render LLM exec assets
   196→	hclPath, err := o.runner.RenderLLMExecAssets(branch.ID)
   197→	if err != nil {
   198→		result.Status = "failed"
   199→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to render LLM exec assets: %v", err)
   200→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   201→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   202→		return result
   203→	}
   204→
   205→	// Step 2: Generate unique run ID for this branch
   206→	runID := fmt.Sprintf("llm-exec-%s-%d", branch.ID, time.Now().Unix())
   207→
   208→	// Step 3: Substitute environment variables in HCL template
   209→	renderedHCLPath, err := substituteHCLTemplate(hclPath, runID)
   210→	if err != nil {
   211→		result.Status = "failed"
   212→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to substitute HCL template: %v", err)
   213→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   214→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   215→		return result
   216→	}
   217→
   218→	// Step 4: Submit job to Nomad and wait for completion
   219→	timeout := 30 * time.Minute
   220→	if err := orchestration.SubmitAndWaitTerminal(renderedHCLPath, timeout); err != nil {
   221→		result.Status = "failed"
   222→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("LLM exec job failed: %v", err)
   223→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   224→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   225→		return result
   226→	}
   227→
   228→	// Step 5: Check for generated diff.patch artifact
   229→	diffPath := filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(renderedHCLPath), "out", "diff.patch")
   230→	if _, err := os.Stat(diffPath); err != nil {
   231→		result.Status = "failed"
   232→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("LLM exec job completed but no diff.patch found: %v", err)
   233→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   234→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   235→		return result
   236→	}
   237→
   238→	result.Status = "completed"
   239→	result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("LLM exec job completed successfully, diff.patch at: %s", diffPath)
   240→	result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   241→	result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   242→	return result
   243→}
   244→
   245→// executeORWGenBranch executes an OpenRewrite recipe generation and application branch
   246→func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeORWGenBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   247→	// Step 1: Render ORW apply assets
   248→	hclPath, err := o.runner.RenderORWApplyAssets(branch.ID)
   249→	if err != nil {
   250→		result.Status = "failed"
   251→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to render ORW apply assets: %v", err)
   252→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   253→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   254→		return result
   255→	}
   256→
   257→	// Step 2: Read HCL template and substitute recipe-specific variables
   258→	hclBytes, err := os.ReadFile(hclPath)
   259→	if err != nil {
   260→		result.Status = "failed"
   261→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to read ORW HCL template: %v", err)
   262→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   263→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   264→		return result
   265→	}
   266→
   267→	// Get recipe configuration from branch inputs
   268→	rclass := ""
   269→	rcoords := ""
   270→	rtimeout := "10m"
   271→	
   272→	if inputs, ok := branch.Inputs["recipe_config"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   273→		if class, ok := inputs["class"].(string); ok {
   274→			rclass = class
   275→		}
   276→		if coords, ok := inputs["coords"].(string); ok {
   277→			rcoords = coords
   278→		}
   279→		if timeout, ok := inputs["timeout"].(string); ok {
   280→			rtimeout = timeout
   281→		}
   282→	}
   283→
   284→	// Perform recipe-specific substitution
   285→	rendered := strings.NewReplacer(
   286→		"${RECIPE_CLASS}", rclass,
   287→		"${RECIPE_COORDS}", rcoords,
   288→		"${RECIPE_TIMEOUT}", rtimeout,
   289→	).Replace(string(hclBytes))
   290→
   291→	// Write substituted HCL to a new file
   292→	renderedHCLPath := strings.ReplaceAll(hclPath, ".rendered.hcl", ".rendered.submitted.hcl")
   293→	if err := os.WriteFile(renderedHCLPath, []byte(rendered), 0644); err != nil {
   294→		result.Status = "failed"
   295→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to write substituted ORW HCL: %v", err)
   296→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   297→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   298→		return result
   299→	}
   300→
   301→	// Step 3: Submit job to Nomad and wait for completion
   302→	timeout := 30 * time.Minute
   303→	if err := orchestration.SubmitAndWaitTerminal(renderedHCLPath, timeout); err != nil {
   304→		result.Status = "failed"
   305→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("ORW apply job failed: %v", err)
   306→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   307→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   308→		return result
   309→	}
   310→
   311→	// Step 4: Check for generated diff.patch artifact
   312→	diffPath := filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(renderedHCLPath), "out", "diff.patch")
   313→	if _, err := os.Stat(diffPath); err != nil {
   314→		result.Status = "failed"
   315→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("ORW apply job completed but no diff.patch found: %v", err)
   316→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   317→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   318→		return result
   319→	}
   320→
   321→	result.Status = "completed"
   322→	result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("ORW apply job completed successfully, diff.patch at: %s", diffPath)
   323→	result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   324→	result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   325→	return result
   326→}
   327→
   328→// executeHumanStepBranch handles human intervention branches (placeholder for now)
   329→func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeHumanStepBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   330→	// Human step branches require manual intervention and are not automated
   331→	// This would typically involve creating an issue/MR and waiting for human input
   332→	result.Status = "failed"
   333→	result.Notes = "human-step branches are not yet implemented - requires manual intervention workflow"
   334→	result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   335→	result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   336→	return result
   337→}
   338→

450→			Duration: time.Since(buildStart),
   451→		})
   452→
   453→		// Check if self-healing is enabled
   454→		if r.config.SelfHeal != nil && r.config.SelfHeal.Enabled && r.jobSubmitter != nil {
   455→			// Attempt healing workflow
   456→			healingSummary, healingErr := r.attemptHealing(ctx, repoPath, message)
   457→			result.HealingSummary = healingSummary
   458→
   459→			if healingErr == nil && healingSummary.Winner != nil {
   460→				// Healing succeeded! Continue with the healed version
   461→				result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   462→					StepID:   "healing",
   463→					Success:  true,
   464→					Message:  fmt.Sprintf("Healing succeeded with plan %s", healingSummary.PlanID),
   465→					Duration: time.Since(buildStart),
   466→				})
   467→				// Continue with normal workflow (push, etc.)
   468→			} else {
   469→				// Healing also failed
   470→				result.ErrorMessage = "build check failed and healing failed"
   471→				result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   472→				return nil, fmt.Errorf("build check failed: %s (healing also failed: %v)", message, healingErr)
   473→			}
   474→		} else {
   475→			// No healing enabled, fail immediately
   476→			result.ErrorMessage = "build check failed"
   477→			result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   478→			return nil, fmt.Errorf("build check failed: %s", message)
   479→		}
   480→	}
   481→
   482→	if buildResult != nil {
   483→		result.BuildVersion = buildResult.Version
   484→	}
   485→	result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   486→		StepID:   "build",
   487→		Success:  true,
   488→		Message:  "Build completed successfully",
   489→		Duration: time.Since(buildStart),
   490→	})
   491→
   492→	// Step 6: Push branch
   493→	if err := r.gitOps.PushBranch(ctx, repoPath, r.config.TargetRepo, branchName); err != nil {
   494→		result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   495→			StepID:  "push",
   496→			Success: false,
   497→			Message: fmt.Sprintf("Push failed: %v", err),
   498→		})
   499→		result.ErrorMessage = fmt.Sprintf("failed to push branch: %v", err)

1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"testing"
     7→	"time"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
    10→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
    11→)
    12→
    13→// Mock job submission interfaces for testing - move these to top of file
    14→// to be available to all parts of the package
    15→type MockJobSubmitter struct {
    16→	SubmitError   error
    17→	WaitError     error
    18→	CollectError  error
    19→	SubmitCalled  bool
    20→	WaitCalled    bool
    21→	CollectCalled bool
    22→	SubmittedJobs []JobSpec
    23→	JobResults    map[string]JobResult
    24→	ArtifactPaths map[string]string
    25→}
    26→
    27→// JobSpec and JobResult types are now defined in types.go
    28→
    29→func (m *MockJobSubmitter) SubmitAndWaitTerminal(ctx context.Context, spec JobSpec) (JobResult, error) {
    30→	m.SubmitCalled = true
    31→	m.SubmittedJobs = append(m.SubmittedJobs, spec)
    32→
    33→	if m.SubmitError != nil {
    34→		return JobResult{}, m.SubmitError
    35→	}
    36→
    37→	// Return mock result
    38→	result := JobResult{
    39→		JobID:    fmt.Sprintf("job-%s-%d", spec.Name, time.Now().Unix()),
    40→		Status:   "completed",
    41→		Duration: 30 * time.Second,
    42→	}
    43→
    44→	if mockResult, exists := m.JobResults[spec.Name]; exists {
    45→		result = mockResult
    46→	}
    47→
    48→	return result, m.WaitError
    49→}
    50→
    51→func (m *MockJobSubmitter) CollectArtifacts(ctx context.Context, jobID string, outputDir string) (map[string]string, error) {
    52→	m.CollectCalled = true
    53→
    54→	if m.CollectError != nil {
    55→		return nil, m.CollectError
    56→	}
    57→
    58→	if artifacts, exists := m.ArtifactPaths[jobID]; exists {
    59→		return map[string]string{"plan.json": artifacts}, nil
    60→	}
    61→
    62→	return map[string]string{}, nil
    63→}
    64→
    65→// Test job submission helpers
    66→func TestSubmitPlannerJob(t *testing.T) {
    67→	tests := []struct {
    68→		name          string
    69→		config        *TransflowConfig
    70→		buildError    string
    71→		expectError   bool
    72→		expectJobType string
    73→	}{
    74→		{
    75→			name: "successful planner submission",
    76→			config: &TransflowConfig{
    77→				ID:         "test-workflow",
    78→				TargetRepo: "https://github.com/test/repo",

content.text: Now let me look at the types to understand the data structures being used:

content.content:
1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"time"
     6→)
     7→
     8→// Job submission types for transflow healing workflow
     9→
    10→// JobSpec describes a job to be submitted to the orchestrator
    11→type JobSpec struct {
    12→	Name    string                 `json:"name"`
    13→	Type    string                 `json:"type"`
    14→	HCLPath string                 `json:"hcl_path"`
    15→	EnvVars map[string]string      `json:"env_vars"`
    16→	Timeout time.Duration          `json:"timeout"`
    17→	Inputs  map[string]interface{} `json:"inputs"`
    18→}
    19→
    20→// JobResult contains the result of a completed job
    21→type JobResult struct {
    22→	JobID     string            `json:"job_id"`
    23→	Status    string            `json:"status"` // "completed", "failed", "timeout"
    24→	Output    string            `json:"output"`
    25→	Error     string            `json:"error"`
    26→	Duration  time.Duration     `json:"duration"`
    27→	Artifacts map[string]string `json:"artifacts"`
    28→}
    29→
    30→// PlanResult contains the output from a planner job
    31→type PlanResult struct {
    32→	PlanID  string                   `json:"plan_id"`
    33→	Options []map[string]interface{} `json:"options"`
    34→}
    35→
    36→// NextAction describes what the reducer determined should happen next
    37→type NextAction struct {
    38→	Action string `json:"action"`
    39→	Notes  string `json:"notes"`
    40→}
    41→
    42→// BranchSpec describes a healing branch to execute
    43→type BranchSpec struct {
    44→	ID     string                 `json:"id"`
    45→	Type   string                 `json:"type"`
    46→	Inputs map[string]interface{} `json:"inputs"`
    47→}
    48→
    49→// BranchResult contains the result of executing a healing branch
    50→type BranchResult struct {
    51→	ID         string        `json:"id"`
    52→	Status     string        `json:"status"`
    53→	JobID      string        `json:"job_id"`
    54→	Notes      string        `json:"notes"`
    55→	StartedAt  time.Time     `json:"started_at"`
    56→	FinishedAt time.Time     `json:"finished_at"`
    57→	Duration   time.Duration `json:"duration"`
    58→}
    59→
    60→// Interface definitions
    61→
    62→// JobSubmissionHelper provides methods for submitting transflow jobs
    63→type JobSubmissionHelper interface {
    64→	SubmitPlannerJob(ctx context.Context, config *TransflowConfig, buildError string, workspace string) (*PlanResult, error)
    65→	SubmitReducerJob(ctx context.Context, planID string, results []BranchResult, winner *BranchResult, workspace string) (*NextAction, error)
    66→}
    67→
    68→// FanoutOrchestrator manages parallel execution of healing branches
    69→type FanoutOrchestrator interface {
    70→	RunHealingFanout(ctx context.Context, runCtx interface{}, branches []BranchSpec, maxParallel int) (BranchResult, []BranchResult, error)
    71→}
    72→
